topics.title: Individual Tax Return
topics.summary: Tax year runs 1 July – 30 June. Return due 31 October if self-lodging; later deadlines via registered tax agent. Medicare Levy 2% for most taxpayers.

topics.title: PAYG Withholding & STP
topics.summary: Employers withhold PAYG and report salaries via Single Touch Payroll each pay run. Monthly IAS or BAS lodgements.

topics.title: Superannuation Guarantee
topics.summary: Employer super contribution rate rising to 12% from 1 July 2025. Maximum contribution base A$65,070 per quarter (2024-25).

topics.title: GST
topics.summary: GST 10% standard. Compulsory registration for turnover ≥ A$75,000 (A$150,000 for non-profits). BAS lodged monthly or quarterly.

topics.title: Company Tax
topics.summary: Base-rate entities (turnover <A$50m passive-income test) 25%; otherwise 30%. Return due 28 February following year end for standard balancers.
